docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,298.20 FILED BY LEE, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
